<write_to_file>
<path>app/cli.py</path>
<content>
from __future__ import annotations
import os
import click
from .core import TodoService
from .store import make_store

def _default_sqlite_path() -> str:
    # Use TXN_TODO_DB env var if set, else default to .data/todo.sqlite3 in CWD
    return os.environ.get("TXN_TODO_DB", os.path.join(os.getcwd(), ".data", "todo.sqlite3"))

@click.group()
@click.option("--store", "store_kind", type=click.Choice(["mem", "sqlite"]), default="mem", help="Select store backend: mem or sqlite")
@click.option("--sqlite-path", type=click.Path(dir_okay=False, writable=True), default=None, help="Path to SQLite DB file")
@click.pass_context
def main(ctx: click.Context, store_kind: str, sqlite_path: str | None):
    # If using sqlite and no path is provided, use env var or default path
    if store_kind == "sqlite" and sqlite_path is None:
        sqlite_path = _default_sqlite_path()
    try:
        store = make_store(store_kind, sqlite_path)
    except NotImplementedError as e:
        raise click.ClickException(f"Store '{store_kind}' is not implemented: {e}")
    ctx.obj = TodoService(store)

@main.command()
@click.argument("title")
@click.pass_obj
def add(svc: TodoService, title: str):
    """Add a new todo item."""
    t = svc.add(title)
    click.echo(f"{t.id}\t{t.title}\t{int(t.done)}")

@main.command("list")
@click.pass_obj
def _list(svc: TodoService):
    """List all todo items."""
    for t in svc.list():
        click.echo(f"{t.id}\t{t.title}\t{int(t.done)}")

@main.command()
@click.argument("todo_id")
@click.pass_obj
def done(svc: TodoService, todo_id: str):
    """Mark a todo item as done."""
    t = svc.mark_done(todo_id)
    click.echo(f"{t.id}\t{t.title}\t{int(t.done)}")

@main.command()
@click.argument("todo_id")
@click.pass_obj
def delete(svc: TodoService, todo_id: str):
    """Delete a todo item."""
    svc.delete(todo_id)
    click.echo("OK")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
</content>
</write_to_file>
